name: GoBattle 2
author: Poki
description: GoBattle 2 is the sequel of the fun party game packed with action and laughs! Compete with your friends on the same device in tons of fast-paced mini games that test your timing, strategy, speed, and reflexes. With simple one-button controls and nonstop fun, it's perfect for quick matches and chaotic moments. Ready to outplay, outsmart, and outlast your friends? How to play GoBattle2? Follow the instructions displayed on screen for each mini game. Who created GoBattle2? GoBattle2 is created by YouDevice!. Play their other games on Poki: GoBattle , Minibattles Survivor and SuperBattle 2 ! How can I play GoBattle2 for free? You can play GoBattle2 for free on Poki. Can I play GoBattle2 on mobile devices and desktop? GoBattle2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play GoBattle2 with my friend? Yes! GoBattle2 is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
